Class SportsBus

java.lang.Object
Bus
SportsBus
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Bus>
Direct Known Subclasses:
PartyBus
public class SportsBus extends Bus
Represents a SportsBus, a specialized type of Bus used for transporting competitors and staff for sporting events. A SportsBus includes additional space for competitors and a security level. It extends the Bus superclass and overrides methods for updating its data.

    • SportsBus

      public SportsBus(String name, int size, int price, int lev, Ministry mny, int competitorArea, int security)
      Constructor for SportsBus
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the bus
      size - The size of the bus
      price - The price of the bus
      lev - The level of the bus
      mny - The Ministry managing this bus
      competitorArea - The area reserved for competitors
      security - The security level

      public void setSecurity(int security)

      Parameters:

    • updateLocalData

      public void updateLocalData(Scanner scan)
      Updates the bus details interactively using user input. Allows modification of name, size, price, level, competitor area, and security level. Pressing enter keeps the current value.
      Overrides:
      updateLocalData in class Bus
      Parameters:
      scan - Scanner used to read user input

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the SportsBus.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Bus
      Returns:
      formatted string containing bus details
